# Blueprint Modular

Blueprint Modular is a Python/React framework for building business interfaces without HTML or JavaScript. Developers import components from bpm and the framework handles rendering.

## Framework
- Components: bpm.metric, bpm.table, bpm.title, bpm.toggle, bpm.panel, bpm.tabs, bpm.button, bpm.modal
- Modules: wiki, ia (AI chat), documents (contract analysis), veille (monitoring), ibkr (Interactive Brokers)
- Installation: pip install blueprint-modular or git clone https://github.com/remigit55/blueprint-modular
- Documentation: https://blueprint-modular.com/docs

## Key concepts
- bpm components map directly to Python function calls
- No HTML/CSS/JS knowledge required
- Built-in dark/light mode, mobile responsive
- Module system for extending functionality
- AI assistant integrated (Claude, GPT, Gemini, Grok)
